---
title: Piazza di Spagna
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557476/rome_20230404_inj5kh.png
description: Piazza di Spagna, Rome, cours de Savoir dessiner en urban sketching
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/04/04
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557476/rome_20230404_inj5kh.png)
